module-1-terminal-map-project.label: Navigation Checkpoint: Campus Folder Tour
module-1-terminal-map-project.summary: Use pwd, ls, and cd to inspect a prepared folder tree without changing it.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Find the club hub
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: The school club has a prepared folder tree. Use `ls`, enter `club-hub`, and use `pwd` to confirm you are inside it.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Use the terminal. Check your work with `pwd`, `ls`, `cat`, or `find` before clicking Run.

help.concept: This task checks the workspace you build, not one perfect command line.
help.hint_1: Create folders before putting files inside them.
help.hint_2: When you are unsure, inspect the folder first, then make the next small change.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this project step.

0.message: Use `ls` to inspect the starting folder.

2.message: Use `pwd` to confirm where you are.

0.message: Do not use sudo in this beginner workspace.

1.message: Do not use recursive rm in this course.

2.message: Permissions commands are not needed for this workspace.

3.message: Do not download anything for this exercise.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Inspect the newsletter folder
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: From the club hub, move into `newsletter`, list its contents, then move back up one folder.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Use the terminal. Check your work with `pwd`, `ls`, `cat`, or `find` before clicking Run.

help.concept: This task checks the workspace you build, not one perfect command line.
help.hint_1: Create folders before putting files inside them.
help.hint_2: When you are unsure, inspect the folder first, then make the next small change.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: End in the events folder
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Use what you learned to end inside `club-hub/events`. Run `pwd` and `ls` there so the next teammate knows you found the right place.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Use the terminal. Check your work with `pwd`, `ls`, `cat`, or `find` before clicking Run.

project-synopsis.title: Campus folder tour
project-synopsis.bodyMarkdown:
The first project is a navigation checkpoint. You are helping a school club find the right folder before anyone edits files.

You will not create or delete anything yet. Your job is to move carefully, inspect each stop, and finish in the folder the next teammate needs.
